title: Computer Science Blog
content: This is where I will post computer science tidBITS, and interesting things I learn along the way. I will also post about my projects, and other things I find interesting.

title: Back to Basics
content: AI and Machine Learning are all the rage today. They are the latest technologies to generate headlines, following in the footsteps of cryptocurrencies and Virtual Reality. While these innovations garner buzz and progress through boom-and-bust cycles, it's crucial to understand the foundations on which they are built.There's a long road from a single transistor to a pair of VR goggles, from simple binary to complex software. The computer advancements that have occurred in our lifetimes are not always easy to grasp; they often defy the intuition that our species developed over millennia in a world without them. That is why I am planning to start my blog journey by starting with the basics.

title: Visualizing Concepts
content: I am integrating visualizations into my blog to assist in understanding computer science concepts. I'm a visual learner and images have always helped me grasp complex ideas. In this post, nothing fancy, just comparing a switch to a transistor. Transistors are nothing special on their own, but when combined together, that's where the magic happens. For now, let's just leave it at that, a transistor is just a switch that is turned on or off by an electrical signal as opposed to a human flipping a switch. This is the foundation computing hardware.
